query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism of "reasoning" in Large Language Models, specifically addressing the "overthinking" phenomenon which is the inverse of the "reflective masking" mechanism in the user's query. Although the user's question mentions "linguistics" and "mask diffusion," the paper provides essential canonical prior work on the efficiency and control of reasoning processes in LLMs, which is a necessary baseline for any study extending
